name: AI-powered customer support issue resolution with Slack and Notion
description: Analyzes customer support issues using AI text classification and sentiment analysis, searches a Notion knowledge base for solutions, categorizes issues by priority, and posts resolution reports and escalation alerts to Slack.

source.originalName: Automate customer support issue resolution using AI text classifier

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for notifications and escalation

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for knowledge base lookup

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for support issue reports

escalationChannel.description: Slack channel for escalation alerts (defaults to main channel if empty)

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID for the knowledge base

issueDescription.description: Full description of the customer support issue

issueHistory.description: Previous conversation thread or issue history

steps.name: Build prompt for issue classification and sentiment analysis
Build Slack Block Kit issue report
